call.argument: Display information about the current project
Install bundle's web assets under a public directory
Invalidate cache tags for all or a specific pool
Delete an item from a cache pool
Dump the current configuration for an extension
Dump the default configuration for an extension
Display current services for an application
Ensure that arguments injected into services match type declarations
List classes/interfaces you can use for autowiring
List all dotenv files with variables and values
Display configured listeners for an application
Display current routes for an application
Help debug routes by simulating a path info match
Extract missing translations keys from code to translation files
Pull translations from a given provider.
Push translations to a given provider.
Lint an XLIFF file and outputs encountered errors
Lint a YAML file and outputs encountered errors
Set a secret in the vault
Remove a secret from the vault
Decrypt all secrets and stores them in the local vault
Encrypt all local secrets to the vault

service.argument: A string or a connection object

call.argument: Generate a migration by comparing your current database to your mapping information.
Ensures that the metadata storage is at the latest version.
Display a list of all available migrations and their status.
Dump the schema for your database to a migration.
Execute one or more migration versions up or down manually.
Execute a migration to a specified version or the latest available version.
Rollup migrations by deleting all tracked versions and insert the one version that exists.
View the status of a set of migrations.
Tells you if your schema is up-to-date.
Manually add and delete migration versions from the version table.

tag.name: container.error
tag.message: Cannot autowire service "My\RestBundle\Attribute\MyOpenApi\CustomOpenApiType": argument "$name" of method "__construct()" is type-hinted "string", you should configure its value explicitly.

tag.name: container.error
tag.message: Cannot autowire service "My\RestBundle\Attribute\MyOpenApi\MyOpenApi": argument "$httpMethod" of method "__construct()" is type-hinted "string", you should configure its value explicitly.

tag.name: container.error
tag.message: Cannot autowire service "My\RestBundle\Attribute\MyOpenApi\MyOpenApiResponse": argument "$description" of method "__construct()" is type-hinted "string", you should configure its value explicitly.

tag.name: container.error
tag.message: Cannot autowire service "My\RestBundle\Attribute\MyOpenApi\MyOpenApiResponseList": argument "$responses" of method "__construct()" is type-hinted "array", you should configure its value explicitly.

tag.name: container.error
tag.message: Cannot autowire service "My\RestBundle\Attribute\MyOpenApi\Response\BadRequestResponse": argument "$responseClassFqcn" of method "__construct()" is type-hinted "string", you should configure its value explicitly.

tag.name: container.error
tag.message: Cannot autowire service "My\RestBundle\Attribute\MyOpenApi\Response\PaginatedSuccessResponse": argument "$responseClassFqcn" of method "__construct()" is type-hinted "string", you should configure its value explicitly.

tag.name: container.error
tag.message: Cannot autowire service "My\RestBundle\Attribute\MyOpenApi\Response\SuccessResponse": argument "$responseClassFqcn" of method "__construct()" is type-hinted "string", you should configure its value explicitly.

tag.name: container.error
tag.message: Cannot autowire service "My\RestBundle\Serialization\Model\Error": argument "$propertyPath" of method "__construct()" is type-hinted "string", you should configure its value explicitly.

call.argument: Display information about your security firewall(s)

service.deprecated: The "%service_id%" service is deprecated since LexikJWTAuthenticationBundle version 2.0 and will be removed in 3.0
The "%service_id%" service is deprecated since LexikJWTAuthenticationBundle version 2.0 and will be removed in 3.0
The "%service_id%" service is deprecated since LexikJWTAuthenticationBundle version 2.0 and will be removed in 3.0
The "%service_id%" service is deprecated since version 2.5 and will be removed in 3.0. Use lexik_jwt_authentication.key_loader.raw instead.
The "%service_id%" is deprecated since version 2.5 and will be removed in 5.0, use "lexik_jwt_authentication.jws_provider.lcobucci" instead.
The "%service_id%" service is deprecated and will be removed in 3.0, use the new "jwt" authenticator instead.

call.argument: Checks that the bundle is properly configured.
Migrate LexikJWTAuthenticationBundle configuration to the Web-Token one.
Generates a JWT token for a given user.
Generate public/private keys for use in your application.
Show a list of twig functions, filters, globals and tests
Lint a Twig template and outputs encountered errors

tag.name: container.error
tag.message: Cannot autowire service ".service_locator.y4_Zrx.": it needs an instance of "Symfony\Component\Config\Loader\LoaderInterface" but this type has been excluded from autowiring.

tag.message: Cannot autowire service ".service_locator.3_6Rjc8": it references interface "Symfony\Component\Security\Core\User\UserInterface" but no such service exists. Did you create a class that implements this interface?

service.argument: Display information about the current project
Install bundle's web assets under a public directory
Invalidate cache tags for all or a specific pool
Delete an item from a cache pool
Dump the current configuration for an extension
Dump the default configuration for an extension
Display current services for an application
Ensure that arguments injected into services match type declarations
List classes/interfaces you can use for autowiring
List all dotenv files with variables and values
Display configured listeners for an application
Display current routes for an application
Help debug routes by simulating a path info match
Extract missing translations keys from code to translation files
Pull translations from a given provider.
Push translations to a given provider.
Lint an XLIFF file and outputs encountered errors
Lint a YAML file and outputs encountered errors
Set a secret in the vault
Remove a secret from the vault
Decrypt all secrets and stores them in the local vault
Encrypt all local secrets to the vault
Generate a migration by comparing your current database to your mapping information.
Ensures that the metadata storage is at the latest version.
Display a list of all available migrations and their status.
Dump the schema for your database to a migration.
Execute one or more migration versions up or down manually.
Execute a migration to a specified version or the latest available version.

Manually add and delete migration versions from the version table.
Display information about your security firewall(s)
Checks that the bundle is properly configured.
Migrate LexikJWTAuthenticationBundle configuration to the Web-Token one.
Generates a JWT token for a given user.
Generate public/private keys for use in your application.
Show a list of twig functions, filters, globals and tests
Lint a Twig template and outputs encountered errors

service.deprecated: The "%alias_id%" alias is deprecated, use "Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\UriSigner" instead.
The "%alias_id%" service is deprecated, use the "routing.loader.attribute" service instead.
The "%alias_id%" service is deprecated, use the "routing.loader.attribute.directory" service instead.
The "%alias_id%" service is deprecated, use the "routing.loader.attribute.file" service instead.

The "%alias_id%" service alias is deprecated, type-hint against "Symfony\Component\Serializer\Normalizer\NormalizerInterface" or implement "Symfony\Component\Serializer\Normalizer\NormalizerAwareInterface" instead.

The "%alias_id%" service alias is deprecated, type-hint against "Symfony\Component\Serializer\Normalizer\NormalizerInterface" or implement "Symfony\Component\Serializer\Normalizer\NormalizerAwareInterface" instead.
The "%alias_id%" service alias is deprecated, use "Symfony\Bundle\SecurityBundle\Security" instead.
The "%alias_id%" service alias is deprecated, use "Twig\Environment" or "twig" instead.
